shortDescription: Renovated 5-bedroom semi-detached in Trinity Bellwoods with open-concept layout and finished lower level.
fullDescription: Welcome to 18 Beatrice Street in the vibrant Trinity Bellwoods neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. The 5 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
